'''yogawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubbee|rubbee]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-g-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubbee|rubbee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yogawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yogawithi|yogawithi]] || [[word:yogawiji|yogawiji]] || [[word:yogawishi|yogawishi]] || [[word:yogawiki|yogawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yogawuthuthu|yogawuthuthu]] || [[word:yogawujuju|yogawujuju]] || [[word:yogawushushu|yogawushushu]] || [[word:yogawukuku|yogawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yogawuthu|yogawuthu]] || [[word:yogawuju|yogawuju]] || [[word:yogawushu|yogawushu]] || [[word:yogawuku|yogawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yogawufthuf|yogawufthuf]] || [[word:yogawufjuf|yogawufjuf]] || [[word:yogawufshuf|yogawufshuf]] || [[word:yogawufkuf|yogawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yogawethe|yogawethe]] || [[word:yogaweje|yogaweje]] || [[word:yogaweshe|yogaweshe]] || [[word:yogaweke|yogaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yogawothotho|yogawothotho]] || [[word:yogawojojo|yogawojojo]] || [[word:yogawoshosho|yogawoshosho]] || [[word:yogawokoko|yogawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yogawotho|yogawotho]] || [[word:yogawojo|yogawojo]] || [[word:yogawosho|yogawosho]] || [[word:yogawoko|yogawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yogawofthof|yogawofthof]] || [[word:yogawofjof|yogawofjof]] || [[word:yogawofshof|yogawofshof]] || [[word:yogawofkof|yogawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yogawÃŸfthÃŸf|yogawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yogawÃŸfjÃŸf|yogawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yogawÃŸfshÃŸf|yogawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yogawÃŸfkÃŸf|yogawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yogawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|yogawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yogawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|yogawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yogawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|yogawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yogawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|yogawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yogawÃŸfthÃŸf|yogawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yogawÃŸfjÃŸf|yogawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yogawÃŸfshÃŸf|yogawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yogawÃŸfkÃŸf|yogawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yogawÃŸfthÃŸf|yogawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yogawÃŸfjÃŸf|yogawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yogawÃŸfshÃŸf|yogawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yogawÃŸfkÃŸf|yogawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yogawÃḊthÃḊ|yogawÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:yogawÃḊjÃḊ|yogawÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:yogawÃḊshÃḊ|yogawÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:yogawÃḊkÃḊ|yogawÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yogawathatha|yogawathatha]] || [[word:yogawajaja|yogawajaja]] || [[word:yogawashasha|yogawashasha]] || [[word:yogawakaka|yogawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yogawatha|yogawatha]] || [[word:yogawaja|yogawaja]] || [[word:yogawasha|yogawasha]] || [[word:yogawaka|yogawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yogawafthaf|yogawafthaf]] || [[word:yogawafjaf|yogawafjaf]] || [[word:yogawafshaf|yogawafshaf]] || [[word:yogawafkaf|yogawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yogawasha|yogawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yogawshÃḋsha|yogawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yogawrosha|yogawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yogawmusha|yogawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yogawyasha|yogawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyogawnkshÃḋsha|goyogawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyogawnkrosha|goyogawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyogawnkmusha|goyogawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyogawnkyasha|goyogawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yogagawasha|yogagawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yogagawshÃḋsha|yogagawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yogagawrosha|yogagawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yogagawmusha|yogagawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yogagawyasha|yogagawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyogagawnkshÃḋsha|goyogagawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyogagawnkrosha|goyogagawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyogagawnkmusha|goyogagawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyogagawnkyasha|goyogagawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yegÃḊwasha|yegÃḊwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yegÃḊwshÃḋsha|yegÃḊwshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yegÃḊwrosha|yegÃḊwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yegÃḊwmusha|yegÃḊwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yegÃḊwyasha|yegÃḊwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyegÃḊwnkshÃḋsha|goyegÃḊwnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyegÃḊwnkrosha|goyegÃḊwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyegÃḊwnkmusha|goyegÃḊwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyegÃḊwnkyasha|goyegÃḊwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yogfawasha|yogfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yogfawshÃḋsha|yogfawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yogfawrosha|yogfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yogfawmusha|yogfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yogfawyasha|yogfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyogfawnkshÃḋsha|goyogfawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyogfawnkrosha|goyogfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyogfawnkmusha|goyogfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyogfawnkyasha|goyogfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
